channel.title: Comments for page "Hello, Little Girl"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Hello, Little Girl"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Annette is the best. This was a tense read, and even though I'm thoroughly confused, it feels coherent. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I love this so much, even though I can barely comprehend what's going on. I love the formatting on Brandt's speech, although I had to read a few times to figure out what he was actually saying (though I guess that was intended)

Overall a brilliant tale: it made me feel excited- Well, excited and scared

EDIT: It's just hit me the tale at the end of the series where everything is made clear is going to be called "I Know Things Now", isn't it?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm going to admit to upvoting for the dual references to my favorite musical. If that's malicious upvoting so be it.

item.title: author post
item.content:encoded:
hi! im doing my very best to stop this apocalypse!!! ✶✶✶~

part 3 (i think?) of the doomsday contest series beginning with SCP-3475: Our Shifting Foundations, detailing the beginning of the end of a memetic apocalypse. I hope you have as much fun reading this as I did writing this!
